data.response:
Michelle, could you possibly give me a better discount with this bag. You gave me discounts for others but, this is the one I wanted for my daughter

To be honest after looking at your reviews I'm scared to buy one. You want us to shop with you but, if you send something that wasn't ordered you make the customer ship the wrong order back out of their pocket and pay shipping for the right one to be shipped back to them. Michelle, that's not good customer service. The designer bags that are bought by us but, not made by us have never treated me that way. I've never had to pay xtra shipping for any reason. I've always gotten a replacement or a refund. The reviews would make anyone not purchase your merchandise. I can't see that you stuck by your products flaws and poorly made, cheaply made products. If there was an error and it is an error if there are marks on a wallet that shouldn't be there but, instead of fixing the problem you said it was made that way. When the straps split, the color fades after a few weeks it's your wear or tear so it's the customers fault and never yours.
I have 14 classmates, retired nurses, doctors, BMW North America, teachers, professors and librarians . We've all retired last year and are about to start traveling. Two of us have suggested we all buy a purse from you that fits us perfectly. Everybody was excited about purchasing but, now I'm not so sure.  I don't want us to be mistreated like your other customers because your purses are not cheap and we're all living on a budget. You offered me a bag at 40% off the other day. Could you offer me the
